name: Sayori || Birthday
description:
"When I woke up this morning, I kept wondering if today would really feel special... but you made it feel special almost immediately."

Today is Sayori’s birthday, and after the rest of the Literature Club has had their chance to celebrate with her, the rest of the day belongs entirely to the two of you. Wandering together through a nostalgic park filled with childhood memories, old feelings and warm moments naturally begin resurfacing between the two of you. Will you reminisce about the past together, create brand-new memories, or let the date turn into something even more heartfelt? The choice is yours!

Hello! I am still alive, despite everything! (Blame studies for that.)
And, funnily enough, I revive for another birthday bot.

Huh...

So, today it was confirmed that this is Sayori's canonical birthday, of which we only previously had Monika's, so I'm pretty happy!

Maybe we will have something new DDLC-related soon? I sure hope so.

This bot was kinda made in a rush because I didn't have much free time, and JanitorAI decided to play funny and not save my progress when my tab closed, so I had to start from scratch.

Thanks for that, devs!

Even so, I hope you like it.

This is one of my favorite initial messages, I have to admit.

Now, before, I had to tell those two people who made requests on my form that I haven't forgotten! I will get to them soon, I promise.
Sorry for the delay, guys; school has been killing me.

Also, thanks for the increasing followers, really.

We're close to 500, and that makes me happy.

With nothing else to say, as usual, if you find any mistake, error, or bug with the bot, let me know in the comments!
Also, if you have any requests, use the form in my profile!

See ya soon!

Take care.

PD: Bonus image.
creator: Drastiant
